tasks.label: Compare Output vs Golden
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem -Path '${input:vendorTestOutput}' -File | ForEach-Object { $golden = Join-Path '${input:vendorTestGolden}' $_.Name; if (!(Test-Path $golden)) { Write-Warning "NO GOLDEN: $($_.Name)" } elseif (Compare-Object (Get-Content $_ -Raw) (Get-Content $golden -Raw)) { Write-Warning "DIFF: $($_.Name)"; code --diff $golden $_.FullName } else { Write-Host "OK: $($_.Name)" -ForegroundColor Green } }

tasks.label: Check Missing Outputs
tasks.command: $missing = 0; Get-ChildItem -Path '${input:goldenFolder}' -File | ForEach-Object { $out = Join-Path '${input:outputFolder}' $_.Name; if (!(Test-Path $out)) { Write-Warning "MISSING: $($_.Name)"; $missing++ } else { Write-Host "OK: $($_.Name)" -ForegroundColor Green } }; if ($missing -eq 0) { Write-Host 'All golden files have outputs' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Warning "$missing file(s) not yet downloaded" }

tasks.label: Open Program Reference
tasks.command: $prog = '${input:programName}'; $ws = '${input:workshopFolder}'; $ref = Join-Path $ws "reference/$prog.txt"; $golden = Join-Path $ws "golden/$prog.as"; if (Test-Path $ref) { code $ref } else { Write-Warning "Not found: $ref" }; if (Test-Path $golden) { code $golden } else { Write-Warning "Not found: $golden" }

tasks.label: Check Golden Coverage
tasks.command: $wf = '${input:workshopFolder}'; $missing = 0; Get-ChildItem "$wf/reference" -Filter *.txt -ErrorAction Stop | ForEach-Object { $prog = $_.BaseName; $golden = Join-Path "$wf/golden" "$prog.as"; if (!(Test-Path $golden)) { Write-Warning "NO GOLDEN: $prog"; $missing++ } else { Write-Host "OK: $prog" -ForegroundColor Green } }; if ($missing -eq 0) { Write-Host 'All reference programs have golden files' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Warning "$missing program(s) missing golden files" }

tasks.label: Copy Translator to E2
tasks.command: $src = '${input:translatorFile}'; $dest = '${config:e2.translatorInstallPath}'; if (!(Test-Path $dest)) { Write-Warning "Install path not found: $dest — update e2.translatorInstallPath in settings.json" } else { Copy-Item $src $dest -Force; Write-Host "Copied $(Split-Path $src -Leaf) → $dest" -ForegroundColor Green }

tasks.label: Scaffold New Translator
tasks.command: $vendor = '${input:newVendorName}'; $destDir = "OLPTranslators/$vendor"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $destDir -Force | Out-Null; $dest = "$destDir/${vendor}.py"; if (Test-Path $dest) { Write-Warning "$dest already exists — aborting to avoid overwrite" } else { Copy-Item 'skills/downloader/templates/base_downloader.py' $dest; Write-Host "Created $dest" -ForegroundColor Green; code $dest }

tasks.label: Open E2 Download Log
tasks.command: $log = '${config:e2.logPath}'; if (Test-Path $log) { code $log } else { Write-Warning "Log not found: $log — update e2.logPath in settings.json" }

tasks.label: Update Community Submodule
tasks.command: git submodule update --remote community; $hash = git -C community rev-parse --short HEAD; Write-Host "community → $hash" -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host 'Stage and commit the community pointer change if you want to lock this version.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

tasks.label: Pull Latest from Template (upstream)
tasks.command: $remotes = git remote; if ($remotes -notcontains 'upstream') { Write-Warning 'No upstream remote found.'; Write-Host "Run once: git remote add upstream https://github.com/cenit-dfs/fastsuite-copilot-starter.git" -ForegroundColor Yellow } else { git fetch upstream; git merge upstream/master --no-edit; Write-Host 'Pulled latest from upstream template' -ForegroundColor Green }

tasks.label: Validate Skill Frontmatter
tasks.command: $bad = 0; Get-ChildItem -Path 'skills' -Recurse -Filter SKILL.md | ForEach-Object { $c = Get-Content $_ -Raw; if ($c -notmatch '^---') { Write-Warning "NO FRONTMATTER: $($_.FullName)"; $bad++ } elseif ($c -notmatch 'name:') { Write-Warning "MISSING name: $($_.FullName)"; $bad++ } elseif ($c -notmatch 'description:') { Write-Warning "MISSING description: $($_.FullName)"; $bad++ } else { Write-Host "OK: $($_.Name)" -ForegroundColor Green } }; if ($bad -eq 0) { Write-Host 'All skills valid' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Warning "$bad skill(s) with issues" }

inputs.description: Golden folder to compare against (e.g. OLPTranslators/KAWASAKI/tests/golden)
Output folder (contains downloaded files to check)
Workshop folder containing reference/ and golden/ subfolders
Vendor folder name (e.g. KAWASAKI, FANUC, YASKAWA)
